ideation: This animation sequence represents the concept of monthly payments or a recurring schedule, using arm movements to suggest a cyclical pattern or the turning of pages on a calendar.  The animation will use both arms to create a sense of repetition. The movement starts with arms outstretched, then they come together, symbolizing the closing of a month or the completion of a cycle, before opening up again to start a new cycle.  I'll utilize slight variations in joint angles to avoid rigidness and to create a more organic, flowing movement.  The final pose will be similar to the initial pose but not identical, to represent the continuous nature of monthly payments.

frames.beat: arms open wide, ready for the month
arms sweep inward, closing the cycle
arms open again, the cycle continues
